message:
refactor(indexer): remove redundant rusqlite health probe from full-rebuild restart logic

The probe_database_health_via_rusqlite call and its quick_check_ok
branch were made unreachable by the earlier removal of the cross-
database watermark comparison — full_rebuild_requires_historical_
restart now never discards a canonical database, so the health
probe was dead code that only added latency. Simplify the stale-
progress check to just in_progress && canonical_sessions > 0
without the health gate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
